summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new features for Iteration 9: (1) Advanced Analytics Dashboard, (2) Cross-Platform Search, (3) Stripe Subscription/Membership tiers, (4) Edit/Delete Course Controls. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including data-testid verification.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/analytics/dashboard correctly returns overview, enrollment, courses, cohorts, community stats
Analytics endpoint properly restricts access to faculty+ roles (returns error for students)
GET /api/search?q=term correctly searches across courses, community, archives, cohorts, spaces
Search with short query (<2 chars) correctly returns empty results
GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns 3 tiers: Explorer (free), Scholar ($19.99), Elder Circle ($49.99)
GET /api/subscriptions/my-subscription returns current tier (defaults to explorer)
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout with explorer sets free tier immediately
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout with paid tiers returns Stripe checkout URL
PUT /api/courses/{id} correctly enforces owner-only access (403 for non-owners)
DELETE /api/courses/{id} correctly enforces owner-only access (403 for non-owners)
Frontend Analytics page has all required data-testid attributes: analytics-page, stat-cards, users-by-role, course-performance, cohort-comparison, community-activity
Frontend Subscriptions page has all required data-testid attributes: subscriptions-page, tier-explorer, tier-scholar, tier-elder_circle, subscribe-scholar, subscribe-elder_circle
Frontend Sidebar correctly shows Analytics nav for faculty+ only and Membership nav for all users
Frontend SearchBar has data-testid='search-bar' and 'search-input', dropdown shows with data-testid='search-results'
Frontend CoursesPage shows edit (PencilSimple) and delete (Trash) buttons for course owners
seed_data_creation: Test users and courses created with UI_TEST_ and TEST_ prefixes, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested 4 new features: (1) Analytics Dashboard - GET /api/analytics/dashboard returns {overview, enrollment, courses, cohorts, community} with platform stats. Frontend at /analytics with stat-cards, users-by-role, course-performance, cohort-comparison, community-activity sections. (2) Cross-Platform Search - GET /api/search?q=term searches across courses, community, archives, cohorts, spaces. Frontend SearchBar in sidebar with debounced search and dropdown results. (3) Stripe Subscriptions - GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns 3 tiers (Explorer free, Scholar $19.99, Elder Circle $49.99). POST /api/subscriptions/checkout handles free tier immediately or returns Stripe checkout URL for paid tiers. Frontend at /subscriptions with tier cards and subscribe buttons. (4) Course Edit/Delete - PUT/DELETE /api/courses/{id} with owner-only RBAC. Frontend shows edit (PencilSimple) and delete (Trash) icons for course owners.
